Welcome back, Bryce!

Supplements & Protocols

Your personalized supplement regimen and adherence tracking

Bryce's Custom Protocol

Your personalized supplement regimen, carefully designed by Brooke Welsh based on your February 2026 lab results and testosterone optimization goals.

Morning Protocol

Upon Waking

Tongkat Ali - 2 pills

Testosterone support

Omega 3 - 1 capsule

Cardiovascular health

Tyrosine - 1 capsule

Cognitive function

Vitamin D3K2 - 1 capsule

Bone health, hormone production

Nitric Oxide - 1 serving

Circulation, exercise performance

Afternoon Protocol

Mid-Day

Evening Protocol

Before Bed

L-Theanine - 1 capsule

Stress management, focus

Calm Magnesium - 1 serving

Sleep, muscle recovery

Citrate - 1 capsule

Mineral absorption

Zinc - 1 capsule

Immune support, hormone production

Sunfiber GI - 1 serving

Digestive health

Weekly Adherence Tracking

March 15, 2026
Added Zinc 15mg (Evening) - Immune support
Based on latest testosterone optimization

Provider Notes & Recommendations

Brooke Welsh, WHNP March 25, 2026

Excellent adherence to current protocol! Testosterone levels are responding beautifully to the pellet + supplement combination. The addition of zinc should help maintain optimal levels longer. Continue current regimen through next labs in May.

System Recommendation March 20, 2026

Consider timing Tongkat Ali with workout schedule for maximum benefit. Take 30 minutes before training when possible.
